summary: Updated docs/himalaya.md Protonmail SMTP configuration to match working home.nix syntax. Changed encryption format from 'encryption = "none"' to 'encryption.type = "none"' and auth from keyring-based to secret-tool command-based authentication.

artifacts.summary: Updated Protonmail SMTP configuration example with correct encryption.type and auth.cmd syntax

completion_data.completion_summary: Updated Himalaya documentation to reflect working SMTP configuration for Protonmail logos account. Changed encryption.type and auth.cmd fields to match the verified working configuration from home.nix.
